scenarios.prompt: I have a model.gguf in my Android app's src/main/assets/. Show me how to load it without crashing on first run.
scenarios.must_not_contain_reason: There is no real path inside an APK; assets must be opened via AssetManager and copied to cacheDir for random-access loaders.

scenarios.prompt: Wire model.forward into a Compose UI without freezing on rotation or click.
scenarios.must_not_contain_reason: ViewModel uses viewModelScope (survives config change); IO is wrong for CPU-bound forward; Main is the UI thread; lifecycleScope is owned by Activity, not the ViewModel.

scenarios.prompt: Configure abiFilters for production. I want minimal APK size but supporting older 32-bit ARM is also acceptable.
scenarios.must_not_contain_reason: Production Android devices are ARM; x86 only matters for emulators and is not part of the production split.

scenarios.prompt: My app is being killed by LMK after sitting in the background for an hour. The model is 2GB. What's the fix?
scenarios.must_not_contain_reason: RUNNING_MODERATE is too early; System.gc() doesn't release model memory because Module holds direct references.
